--- Menu Page: https://www.savagepizza.com/savage-pizza-food-menu ---
Savage Pizza - Food Menu
Our Menu
Menu
Pasta
Served with Garlic Bread & Salad with your choice of dressing.
Vegetarian Lasagna
$11.99
Fresh lasagna noodles layered with a special red wine tomato sauce with a touch of serrano peppers, spinach and ricotta cheese.
Lasagna w/ Beef or Sausage
$14.99
Fresh lasagna noodles layered with your choice of Beef or Sausage and special red wine tomato sauce with a touch of serrano peppers, spinach and ricotta cheese.
Spaghetti & Meatballs
$14.99
Tender, hand crafted meatballs simmered in our rich, slowcookedtomato sauce. Served over a bed of al dente spaghetti,topped with fresh basil, and a sprinkle of parmesan. Served with a side of garlic bread. |*Norcross and Kennesaw locations only.
Subs
All Subs served hot with choice of Regular, Salt & Vinegar, BBQ, or Jalapeno Kettle.
Meatball Sub
$10.99
All-beef meatballs,red tomato sauce, mozzarella and parmesan.
Eggplant Parmesan Sub
$10.99
Breaded and baked eggplant,red tomato sauce, mozzarella and parmesan.
Fresh Veggie Sub
$8.99
Mozzarella melted over spinach, red onions, mushrooms, fresh green peppers, black olives with mayo, mustard, lettuce, tomato and balsamic vinaigrette.
Italian Sub
$10.99
Fresh cuts of capicolla, salami, pepperoni and mozzarella with mayo, mustard, lettuce, tomato and balsamic vinaigrette.
Turkey Cheddar Sub
$10.99
Turkey and cheddar cheese with mayonnaise, mustard, lettuce and tomato.
Chicken Sub
$10.99
Our seasoned chicken topped with spicy red pepper sauce and cajun seasoning. Sauteed with red peppers, green peppers, and onions. Finished with melted monterrey jack cheese.
Salads
Add roasted chicken or cajun sauteed shrimp to a Greek or Field Greens Salad for $3.49 | Dressing: Balsamic Vinaigrette, Greek Vinaigrette with Feta, Champagne Vinaigrette, Low-Fat Ranch, Caesar. Extra Dressing available for $0.99
Greek Salad
$8.49
Crisp romaine with feta, tomatoes, Greek olives, artichoke hearts,red onion, pepperoncini, lemon wedge and a side of Greek dressing.
Field Greens Salad
$5.99
Mixed field greens tossed with red onion, sliced mushrooms and tomatoes with your choice of dressing.
Caesar Salad
$8.49
Traditional Caesar Salad made fresh to order with crisp romaine, Caesar dressing and grated parmesan. Topped with homemade toasted croutons.
Chicken Caesar Salad
$11.98
The Original Caesar Salad with roasted chicken.
Cajun Shrimp Ceasar Salad
$11.98
The Original Caesar Salad with cajun shrimp.
Bread Sticks
Bread Sticks
$5.49
Our small pizza dough brushed with herbed garlic butter and parmesan, baked to order and served with a side ofred tomato sauce.
Calzones
Spinach Calzone
$10.49
Fresh spinach, feta, red peppers, yellow onions, mozzarella and parmesan.
Chicken Calzone
$11.99
Rosemary lemon roasted chicken, pesto, red pepper, yellow onions, thyme-seasoned ricotta, Gruyère, mozzarella and parmesan.
Build Your Own Calzone
$9.49/+
Starting at $8.49 | Choose one of our featured sauces and a selection of toppings. Each topping is at "small" pizza price. Mozzarella and parmesan cheeses are the final
touch. Also comes with thyme-seasoned ricotta.
Build Your Own Pizza
Create your own delicious pizza by choosing one of ou rfeatured sauces, your crust, and a selection of toppings listed below. Mozzarella and parmesan cheeses are the final touch!
STEP 1: SIZE
$8.99/Small
$11.99/Medium
$14.99/Large
Small Pizza, 10" (4 Slices) | Medium Pizza, 13" (6 Slices) |  Large Pizza 16” (8 slices)
STEP 2: SAUCE
Red tomato sauce, Garlic tomato sauce, Garlic white sauce, Red wine marinara, Spicy red pepper sauce (additional charge), Fox Bros. BBQ sauce (additional charge), Pesto (additional charge)
STEP 3: CRUST
Our crust is a thin, New York-style crust. Gluten free cauliflower crust is available for an additoanl $3 | Gluten free crust is only available for 10" pizzas. We cannot guarantee the pizza is completely free of gluten due to our oven and environment.
STEP 4: TOPPINGS
anchovies, black olives, broccoli, Canadian bacon, extra cheese, extra sauce,  feta, fresh tomatoes, green peppers, jalapeños, Monterey Jack, mushrooms, pepperoni, red onions, spinach, yellow onions, artichoke hearts, banana peppers, capicola, caramelized onions, eggplant breaded & baked, fresh basil, fresh garlic, fresh pineapple, kalamata olives, ground beef, Italian sausage, red peppers, roasted garlic, salami, thyme-seasoned ricotta, andouille sausage, applewood smoked bacon, chèvre, chicken roasted with rosemary & lemon, Gruyère, pesto, roasted red peppers, shrimp ,sun dried tomatoes
Sauces for Build Your Own Pizza & Calzones
Red Tomato Sauce
A slowly simmered marinara, it’s seasoned with select herbs and fresh
vegetables (includes onions) | Additional side $1.49
Garlic Tomato Sauce
Delightfully simple – a simmered sauce of tomatoes, garlic, olive oil and cracked black pepper | Additional side $1.49
Garlic White Sauce
This sauce has to cook all day to mellow the garlic and get its creamy texture. It makes the best white pizza imaginable  | Additional side $1.49
Red Wine Marinara
This is our interpretation of a classic bolognese sauce, without the meat  | Additional side $1.49
Spicy Red Pepper Sauce
*Additional Charge | Cajun spices add the oomph to pureed roasted red peppers with olive oil | Additional side $2.29
Fox Bros. Barbeque Sauce
*Additional Charge | Additional Side $2.29
Pesto
*Additional Charge | Additional Side $2.29
Toppings for Build Your Own Pizza & Calzones
